title: AngelsAndTaverns
description: Smart villagers and realism, the world feels alive
body:
AngelsAndTaverns: The World Feels Alive

AngelsAndTaverns is a realism and horror-focused mod that makes Minecrafts villagers truly feel alive with smarter behaviors, relationships and a few unsettling surprises.


..Smarter Villages..

Villagers no longer stand around aimlessly. They talk, form friendships, react to their surroundings, and behave more like real people. You’ll see them helping each other, panicking during danger and even showing emotions that change depending on what’s happening around them.


..A Darker World..

As night falls, the game takes on a more eerie tone. Torches might disappear or go out. Nights last longer than they should. Strange noises echo through the world when your alone.

The world starts to feel alive but not in a comforting way.


..Development Status..

This mod is still in very early development, and some features may not work properly in single-player yet. Expect bugs and odd behavior it’s all part of the early testing process. Updates will continue to improve villager AI, add new horror events and make the world even more immersive.


..Why You’ll Want It..

If you’ve ever wanted your Minecraft world to feel alive, reactive and a little unsettling, AngelsAndTaverns is for you.
It’s a blend of realism and atmospheric horror that makes every night feel different and every village feel real.
